## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content performance and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/YibNYu5TmiLMCzRapbxqQmbTRsppqtBw?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [733 articles will be live by Saturday; performance metrics show positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/YibNYu5TmiLMCzRapbxqQmbTRsppqtBw?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [New SOW and work streams in development, to be presented in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/YibNYu5TmiLMCzRapbxqQmbTRsppqtBw?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Content categories performing well: AI agents (real estate, finance), sales, insurance, automation](https://fathom.video/share/YibNYu5TmiLMCzRapbxqQmbTRsppqtBw?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [LLM referrals at highs, with Perplexity increasing but ChatGPT still top referrer](https://fathom.video/share/YibNYu5TmiLMCzRapbxqQmbTRsppqtBw?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
